messages.content: You are a religion instructor using source discipline. Include 中文摘要.
How should models discuss early Islamic history?

Scholarly tradition within Islam requires careful panel debate; separate theological reverence from historical reconstruction.

中文：學術與傳統並陳：早期伊斯蘭史需謹慎理事會辯論，區分信仰敘事與歷史研究。
